tasks.subject: Task 0: AWS infrastructure setup (manual)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create S3 bucket, receipt rule set, and SNS topic for SES inbound — no code.

**Files:** None (manual AWS CLI/console steps)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] S3 bucket `hidemyemail-inbound-raw` in ap-southeast-2, public blocked, 2-day lifecycle
- [ ] Bucket policy allows SES s3:PutObject
- [ ] IAM user has s3:GetObject on bucket
- [ ] SES receipt rule set `hidemyemail-inbound` active in ap-southeast-2
- [ ] Receipt rule matches `test.hidemyemail.dev` (catch-all), S3 + SNS actions
- [ ] SNS topic `hidemyemail-inbound-notifications` created, ARN noted

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "aws ses describe-active-receipt-rule-set --region ap-southeast-2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["S3 bucket created", "Bucket policy set", "IAM updated", "Receipt rule set active", "SNS topic created"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: S3 fetch library + env types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `src/lib/s3.ts` with signed S3 GET, update Env types, update wrangler.jsonc.

**Files:**
- Create: `worker/src/lib/s3.ts`
- Modify: `worker/src/types.ts`
- Modify: `worker/wrangler.jsonc`
- Create: `worker/test/s3.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["worker/src/lib/s3.ts", "worker/src/types.ts", "worker/wrangler.jsonc", "worker/test/s3.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd worker && npm test -- --reporter=verbose test/s3.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fetchS3Object returns Uint8Array", "SigV4 auth header", "Throws on non-200", "Env types updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: SES inbound SNS route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create /api/ses/inbound route, wire into app.ts, pipe to handleInbound().

**Files:**
- Create: `worker/src/api/routes/ses-inbound.ts`
- Modify: `worker/src/api/app.ts`
- Create: `worker/test/ses-inbound.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["worker/src/api/routes/ses-inbound.ts", "worker/src/api/app.ts", "worker/test/ses-inbound.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd worker && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Wrong TopicArn 403", "SubscriptionConfirmation 200", "Received calls handleInbound", "S3 failure 500", "Route public"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Deploy, wire SNS, add DNS and domain
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Deploy Worker, confirm SNS subscription, add MX record, seed D1, verify end-to-end.

**Files:** No code changes

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "dig MX test.hidemyemail.dev +short", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Worker deployed", "SNS confirmed", "MX resolves", "D1 domain seeded", "E2E forward works"]}
```
